sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM part list for HAD1417MCW, including detector assembly, packaging, accessory, electrical, battery, labeling, and optional warning label items.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports RA/DHF traceability of HAD1417MCW components, materials, suppliers, quantities, labels, accessories, and selected regulatory or standards-related markings.
keyPoints: The document contains HAD1417MCW part lists for CsI Type and Accessory configurations.
The BOM lists batteries, charger/recharger items, power cords, harnesses, Wi-Fi module, power supply, labels, packaging, and detector assemblies.
Regulatory or standards-related references include IEC60332-1, UL94V-0, UL, CEE/EAC/ISC/SNI, and Proposition 65.

concepts.name: UL power supply marking
concepts.evidence: POWER SUPPLY, DEPS9601 (B-Type), AC/DC, 48W, AC220V, 50-60Hz,207x154x64mm, DC16V, +10to+40C, UL

evidence.claim: The source is a HAD1417MCW part list/BOM.
The document identifies HAD1417MCW as the item name.
The HAD1417MCW configuration includes CsI Type.
The BOM includes a HAD1417MCW Detector Set Assembly.
The accessory BOM includes a Li-ion Polymer 3400mAh battery.
The accessory BOM includes a power supply marked UL.
evidence.evidenceText: AMI44-01042A,SMPS-2G_DETECTOR_POWER_BOX,전장,AMI44-01042A,0,"POWER SUPPLY, DEPS9601 (B-Type), AC/DC, 48W, AC220V, 50-60Hz,207x154x64mm, DC16V, +10to+40C, UL"

evidence.claim: The accessory BOM includes a power cord with CEE/EAC/ISC/SNI references.
evidence.evidenceText: A3903-001241,POWER CORD-DT,하네스,A3903-001241,0,"EUR, 2P-S, 250V, 10A, BLK, L1500, H05VV-F 3x0.75mm2, CEE/EAC/ ISC/SNI, Shield Y, 3P(C13)-S, Fuse N"

evidence.claim: The accessory BOM includes a harness specification referencing IEC60332-1.
The BOM includes harness signal cables with UL94V-0 material reference.

evidence.claim: The accessory option list includes a Proposition 65 warning label for US application.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not present in the provided source text or metadata.
Authority signal is general; jurisdiction entries are inferred only from explicit BOM text such as Proposition 65 and 미국향만 적용.
Revision/version is taken from the source filename Rev.1; internal BOM rows mostly show component Rev No. 0.
The preprocessed spreadsheet text contains CSV-like line wrapping and mixed Korean/English fields, so some long specifications may be fragmented.
